user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new work from home approver, so that WFH requests are routed to the correct approvers by location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Work From Home Approvers screen; When I click Add new work from home approver and define the location(s) and approver(s); Then the WFH approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the maximum work from home hours that can be approved by the immediate supervisor, so that supervisor approval authority is capped
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Work From Home Approvers screen; When I enter the maximum WFH hours approvable by immediate supervisor and Save; Then WFH beyond that cap requires higher approval

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view work from home approvers with their locations and approver hierarchy, so that I can verify approval routing
acceptance_criteria: Given WFH approvers exist; When I open the Work From Home Approvers screen; Then each record is listed with its location(s) and approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing WFH approver and save & next, so that I can update routing and continue the setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given a WFH approver is listed; When I click Edit, update the details and click Save & Next; Then the changes are saved and I proceed to the next screen
